query: /pmax build a prompt for an agent that manages NULLABLE foreign keys with ON DELETE CASCADE behavior
expected_behavior: Every AskUserQuestion question text uses plain words a non-expert can read.
Every AskUserQuestion option label uses plain words; technical terms in labels are reserved for cases where no plain alternative exists.
Every option whose label contains a technical term includes a plain-language explanation in the description.
The skill never uses hedging words (plausibly, maybe, probably, could) in its own questions or descriptions.
Validator fails and returns to Phase 2 if any AskUserQuestion field contains a banned jargon word without plain-language accompaniment.
